title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 447.060 - Failure to discover — penalty
text:
447.060.  Failure to discover — penalty. — If any person find any money, property or other valuable thing, and fail to make discovery of the same as required by this chapter, he shall forfeit to the owner double the value thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 15322) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14232; 1919 § 7292; 1909 § 8273
